content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 2, 0), (1, 8, 1), (5, 8, 1), (4, 5, 2), (7, 8, 4), (1, 5, 5), (2, 5, 5), (8, 9, 7), (1, 4, 10), (6, 9, 11), (2, 7, 12), (0, 9, 15), (1, 9, 16), (2, 9, 16), (1, 3, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 16.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (0, 2, 0) has node 0 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 8, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 8, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 5, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (7, 8, 4) has node 7 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 5, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 5, 5) has node 2 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (8, 9, 7) has node 8 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 4, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (6, 9, 11) has node 6 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 9, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 9, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 9, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 17) has node 1 and time 17. -> Add node 3.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 2 at time 16.

Answer: [8, 9]
